text.title: C# / ASP.NET Core Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example showing the methodology applied end-to-end, with a trace through the rules and the final spec artefact.

section.title: Trace
section.p: Service uses controller→service→repository layering, scoped DbContext, CancellationToken on every async, ProblemDetails errors, record DTOs, TimeProvider, Testcontainers + keyset pagination + eager .Include() + explicit transactions.
